---
title: "Projects"
listing:
  contents:
    - "*.qmd"
    - "!index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [image, date, title, subtitle, categories, description]
  feed: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

I'll talk about my projects here!
